claim: mypy 'Cannot find implementation or library stub for module named fastapi / fastapi.responses / fastapi.exceptions' [import-not-found] + 'Library stubs not installed for yaml' [import-untyped] across src/mame_curator/api/**, filter/**, cli/commands/** (~28-31 warnings per full sw…
rationale: Tool-environment artifact, not a code defect (allowlist-015 in docs/audit-allowlist.md). audit_run runs mypy in a scrubbed env WITHOUT the project's installed deps — fastapi and types-PyYAML are never uv-synced into the audit runner — so mypy can't resolve those imports and flags every fastapi/yaml import site. The project's REAL type check, `uv run mypy` with deps installed, is clean: 0 errors across 203 source files, run in pre-commit AND the CI 'Lint, type-check, test' job on all 8 platform/version combos (verified green at HEAD 76d2641). Every full /audit sweep re-surfaces these until the audit runner installs project deps before invoking mypy (or drops mypy, since CI runs the real one). Pre-discard on sight; do not fold into a fix-pass.
